assets.name: charge_glint
assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style colorless attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact pre-strike glint with an ivory-white core, brushed-silver glow, champagne highlights, and a few restrained feathered fragments. Keep the shape premium, clean, and readable in a game battle overlay. Preserve a neutral battle-energy feel without leaning into fire, water, lightning, psychic, or darkness. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.

assets.name: travel_sheen
assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style colorless attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a directional neutral streak with an ivory-white core, silver pearl shell, and a soft champagne edge, like a clean wind-sheen or refined slash trail. Keep the subject compact and readable, with elegant motion and no heavy smoke or beam clutter. Preserve a neutral battle-energy feel without leaning into fire, water, lightning, psychic, or darkness. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.

assets.name: impact_bloom
assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style colorless attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact target-hit bloom with a bright ivory-white flash core, polished silver petals, champagne rim highlights, and a few crisp neutral shard fragments. Make it the clearest and most premium-read layer in the set, readable at small size and strong in battle hit-stop. Preserve a neutral battle-energy feel without leaning into fire, water, lightning, psychic, or darkness. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.

assets.name: residue_motes
assets.prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style colorless attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a fading aftermath cluster with soft pearl motes, a few broken ring fragments, and subtle ivory/silver afterglow around a compact center. Keep the contrast lower than the impact bloom but still crisp enough to read cleanly in battle. Preserve a neutral battle-energy feel without leaning into fire, water, lightning, psychic, or darkness. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
